home.heroSubtitle: A full-service Jakarta law firm providing strategic legal counsel across bankruptcy, litigation, corporate, and finance.
home.aboutText: Founded by {founder}, Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners has established itself as a trusted legal practice in Jakarta. We combine deep legal expertise with a client-focused approach, guided by three core principles that define everything we do.
home.servicesSubtitle: Three practice pillars. Twelve areas of expertise. One standard: the highest.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Discuss Your Legal Needs?
home.ctaText: Schedule a consultation with our experienced legal team. We’re here to help navigate your most complex legal challenges.
home.clientsTitle: Clients Who Trust Us With What Matters
home.clientsIntro: Our reputation is built on the success of those we represent. From multinational financial institutions to emerging regional leaders, we provide the steady legal counsel required to navigate Indonesia's complex regulatory landscape and high-stakes commercial disputes.
home.secondaryTitle: Trusted Counsel for the Matters That Define Your Business
home.secondarySub: Since 2018, STNP has represented major corporations, banks, and international investors in Indonesia's most consequential legal proceedings. We combine rigorous legal strategy with uncompromising integrity.
home.highlightsSubtitle: A selection of notable matters handled by our partners across complex industries and high-stakes transactions.
home.highlightsDisclaimer: Matters are presented in anonymized form. Prior results do not guarantee similar outcomes.

footer.disclaimer: This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice or establish an attorney-client relationship. Prior results do not guarantee similar outcomes. STNP disclaims all liability for actions taken based on this site's content.

disclaimerFull.title: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimerFull.p1: The materials provided on this website have been prepared by Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners ("STNP") for general informational purposes only. This content does not constitute legal advice, and you should not rely on it as such. The information presented here is not a substitute for consulting with a qualified attorney regarding your specific legal situation. STNP expressly disclaims all liability with respect to actions taken or not taken based on any or all of the contents of this website.
disclaimerFull.p2: Accessing, reading, or interacting with the information on this website does not establish an attorney-client relationship between you and Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners. Such a relationship can only be formed through a formal, written agreement signed by our firm. If you require legal advice or have specific legal questions, please consult with one of our attorneys or seek legal counsel from a qualified professional in your jurisdiction.
disclaimerFull.confidentiality: Do not send confidential information to us through this website or by email until you have established a formal attorney-client relationship with our firm.
disclaimerFull.p3: You should assume that STNP may have professional relationships with providers of goods and services mentioned within this website. STNP does not necessarily endorse, and is not responsible for, any third-party content that may be accessed through this website.
disclaimerFull.p4: The use of this website and the information it contains is also subject to the terms and conditions outlined in our Privacy Policy. If you have any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at admin@stnp.co.id.
